# Learning a new language with Copilot

## Best use

Use Copilot as a guided tutor tied to a real codebase or a bounded set of examples.

## Good workflow

- explain the language through the codebase in front of you
- compare the new language to one you already know
- ask for small transformations and then review them critically
- pair explanations with tests and runnable examples

## Useful tasks

- explain syntax and idioms
- translate patterns from another language
- annotate unfamiliar code
- generate minimal examples
- design a learning sequence based on repository code
